slots.name: streamingProgress
slots.description:
The root element of the streaming progress indicator.
Rendered by Base UI `Progress.Root` when `message.status === 'streaming'`.
Provides `role="progressbar"` and `aria-valuetext` for screen readers.

slots.name: streamingProgressTrack
slots.description: The track element wrapping the streaming progress indicator.

slots.name: streamingProgressIndicator
slots.description: The animated indicator bar inside the streaming progress track.
